title: Baby Mobs Rebrushed
description: Adds baby versions of many vanilla monsters
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d9059ca594fda1e0a6910719ecbb4b62e868ae7.png)

**Baby Mobs Rebrushed!** adds terrifyingly cute baby versions of many hostile mobs, with a 5%(configurable) chance to replace their adult counterparts. These monsters are faster, and many have their own unique abilities. 

Don't let their size fool you - **these babies mean business!**

<details>
<summary>List of mobs and abilities</summary>
  
- Baby Blaze: Sets Fire to Blocks

- Baby Spider: Place Cobwebs

- Baby Creeper: Fiery Explosions

- Baby Ender Dragon: Flies around the Dragon Egg (can be disabled in config)

- Baby Enderman: Shoots Lasers

- Baby Evoker: Uses a Totem of Undying

- Baby Ghast: tiny...

- Baby Guardian: High defense and Regeneration
 
- Baby Phantom: Levitation
 
- Baby Piglin Brute: (Why is this not in Vanilla?)
 
- Baby Pillager: Shoots Fireworks
 
- Baby Shulker: Summons Endermites
 
- Baby Skeleton: Tipped Arrows
 
- Baby Spider: Place Cobwebs
 
- Baby Stray: More Tipped Arrows
 
- Baby Vindicator: Gives Slowness
 
- Baby Warden: Good Luck!
 
- Baby Witch: Wither Kitten Companion

- Baby Wither: Will drop either a Nether Star or Wither Skull; only 1 soul sand and Wither skull needed (Can be disabled)
 
- Baby Wither Skeleton: Shoots Wither Arrows
 
- Baby Zombie: Zombie Chicken Rider

- Baby Zombified Piglin: Zombie Pig Rider (feed Golden Carrots to prevent attacking normal pigs)

</details>

![Foes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3334376856017fadec87845961d0404971fce42b_0.webp)

[Inspired by Furgl's Baby Mobs](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baby-mobs)
